review: It started saying that I’m offline but I still had 3 bars and it would only let me pick one song and play another song after the first one ended but it wouldn’t let me pick a different song to play. I had to swipe it out of the other apps that I already had open in the background and then I would press on it to go back into the app and it would be the same thing, but if I pressed and held my finger down on the app from the home screen and it would show three different song tracks that I listen to and I would click on Mat Kearney to listen to his new song and it would let me press on the song to play it, but while it was still playing or when the song was over, I would look for other songs of his to click on to listen to but it wouldn’t let me! I didn’t only have 3 bars but I was still on my home WiFi and it kept doing that all day for 3 days straight! Now I’m in Wisconsin at my aunt and uncle’s house and it’s playing music just fine and I can click on any song I want. It’s never happened to me before! I want to keep this app on my phone but I’m not going to unless you update it or upgrade it so that doesn’t ever happen again!

Spotify is a great app! It has fun features and you can design your playlist cover, descriptions etc. You don't have to pay for anything, except Spotify Premium. But you don't actually need Spotify Premium to use the app. There are some cons, though. 
First, there are 2-5 ads in between your songs ur it doesn't stop in the middle of your song. Also, sometimes you can't play your songs in your order so they choose a song to play for you, and you can't always skip songs.
But overall, one of my most-used apps-would highly recommend downloading.

review: I’ve used Spotify for 2 years now and I’ve never had premium, and I’ve noticed just how painful it is to use Spotify without premium. First of all, you can’t listen to 1 song without having to listen 3 or 4 ads, all 30 second ads, meaning you listen to ads for like 5 minutes btw. And, Once you finish a song, you immediately listen to like 5 ads, it’s actually ridiculous. And I get the whole “we have to pay artists” thing, but it’s not just the ads that is stupid. For some reason, you can’t rewind, skip more then 6 songs, or really do anything without Spotify premium,  it’s actually horrific, not to mention this whole “newish” thing where if you search and play one too many songs when searching, it prevents you from playing a song you want dand plays a random song that you didn’t pick instead and suggests you get premium. Genuinely how desperate can an app be for a membership… my advice is just use YouTube, they have WAYYYY less ads and it’s just better, Spotify has gotten so bad that’s it not even worth it anymore. The only reason it gets 2 stars is because listening to podcasts on Spotify is actually really nice, and because you get Spotify wrapped. Otherwise, it’s kind of useless, just use YouTube instead!!
title: it’s getting progressively worse…

review: It’s my fav song app. Js amazing. If I don’t know the song and I only know a part of the song it immediately recognizes the lyrics and finds the song. Plays songs that it knows that I will probs like and 75% of the time it’s right. Also plays songs I liked a while ago and they think I would still like(that’s a good thing), and also plays songs that I have been listening to that month and week. (“They” as in the smart shuffle.) Also love DJ X. Js a cool feature, and knows what songs I’ve been liking and bases it off of that. The DJ also shows me new songs and brings me back to older songs js like the smart shuffle.(which is also rlly cool) Love it all! Js thank u for this awesome app.
